regime_summary: loose financial conditions · yield curve steepening

ai_parallel.similarities: FACT: Today's fed_funds (3.75) and y10 (4.29) are within 1% of Oct 2007 levels (4.75 and 4.65). FACT: The curve_2s10s_bps today (51) and in Oct 2007 (85) are both positive and steep, unlike the inverted curves in Feb 2024 (-40), Oct 2022 (-40), and Summer 2019 (-5). FACT: Both periods show loose financial conditions with negative NFCI (today: -0.43, Oct 2007: -0.25) and similar unemployment rates (today: 4.3, Oct 2007: 4.7), with CPI_yoy within 0.2 percentage points (today: 3.3, Oct 2007: 3.5).
ai_parallel.divergences: FACT: Oct 2007 had a steeper curve (85 bps vs today's 51 bps) and even looser financial conditions (NFCI -0.25 vs today's -0.43). INFERENCE: The Oct 2007 regime was labeled 'late_cycle_risk_on' while today is labeled 'risk_on', suggesting today may be earlier in the cycle despite similar rate levels.
